name: The Silver Sister
description_en: The Silver Sister is the celestial of the Moon and the twin sister of 6 The Golden Sister, possibly the deity of the Lunari in which it has its own avatar in Runeterra.
description_fr: La Silver Sister est la céleste de la Lune et la sœur jumelle de 6 The Golden Sister, peut-être la divinité des Lunari dans laquelle elle a son propre avatar dans Runeterra.
